title: Alupssuc 24pcs Poinsettia Christmas Tree Decorations,12pcs Poinsettia Artificial Flowers and 12pcs Stem for Christmas Wreath,Xmas Tree,Christmas Decorations,Red
features: 💮【Boxed Christmas Tree Picks】 12 glitter berry stems and 12 6-inch Christmas flowers and comes with 12 large clips and 12 stems to mount the Christmas flowers. The berry length is about 33cm, the stem length is about 18cm, and the extended rhizome length makes it easier to decorate your Christmas tree!

💮【Multiple Decorative Occasions】 24 glitter Christmas Picks for Christmas tree, New Year, holiday, family, party, and wedding decorations, will highlight your party and make you and your guests enjoy the holidays.

💮【Shatterproof Material】The shiny berries are made of foam balls and wire, and the Christmas flower ornaments are made of a flexible and unbreakable material. They can be bent and operated according to your needs. Berry decorations can be used as photographic props or photo scene Settings or stage decorations.

💮【Easy to Install】12 large clips and 12 stems for Christmas flowers, simply insert the clip tip or stem into the bottom base tube of the Christmas flower and we will provide instructions on how to install them in the package, allowing you to attach them easily to the Christmas tree, wreath or garland.

💮【Widely Applicable】These bright-colored Christmas berry stems and flowers can be used as christmas tree decorations, fillers in living room vases, wreaths, decorations on mantels or door decorations to add to the festive atmosphere.
